Generated Narrative: ConceptMap FRAllowedSubstitutionLMCDAFHIR

This mapping does not specify any particular context of use.


Group 1 Mapping from https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-lm-autorisation-substitution to https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-autorisation-substitution

Source CodeRelationshipTarget Code
FRLMAutorisationSubstitutionis equivalent toFRCDAAutorisationSubstitution
FRLMAutorisationSubstitution.typeSubstitutionis equivalent toFRCDAAutorisationSubstitution.code
FRLMAutorisationSubstitution.statusis equivalent toFRCDAAutorisationSubstitution.statusCode

Group 2 Mapping from https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-autorisation-substitution to https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-medication-request-document

Source CodeRelationshipTarget CodeComment
FRCDAAutorisationSubstitutionis equivalent toFRMedicationRequestDocument.substitution
FRCDAAutorisationSubstitution.codeis equivalent toFRMedicationRequestDocument.substitution.allowedCodeableConcept
FRCDAAutorisationSubstitution.statusCode(not mapped)FRMedicationRequestDocument.substitution ne possède pas d'élément 'status' pour mapper cette donnée.
